ConfigInfo: DeutschZ_KotHZ FIX17 ready loot config. Active test pool is high value and fast-test friendly. Weapons/attachments are based on uploaded All-classes-and-their-attachments.json where applicable.

LootPools.EditHint: ACTIVE TEST POOL. Rich reward crate for quick server testing. Existing profile pool with this name is refreshed by FIX17 code.
